headline: Old Dominion Freight Line (ODFL) Valuation Check After February LTL Metrics Show Mixed Volume And Pricing Trends
summary: Old Dominion Freight Line (ODFL) has put fresh numbers on the table for February, with LTL tons per day and revenue per day down year over year, while LTL revenue per hundredweight moved higher. See our latest analysis for Old Dominion Freight Line. The February update lands against a strong run in the stock, with a 40.83% 90 day share price return and a 23.33% 1 year total shareholder return suggesting momentum has been building despite softer near term freight volumes. If this LTL update...
